title: dactylis polygama f. kroulikii
intro: Dactylis polygama f. kroulikii, also known as a subspecies of Orchard Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dactylis polygama f. kroulikii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
